scope: Function-level nodes and edges for the script-callable type registry and the OnDoFunc dispatch surfaces of tSystem, tSoc, tThread, tFile, tDir, and the tJava JVM bring-up.

nodes_added.name: tlsBase::ACreateObject
nodes_added.summary: Factory for `local tXxx name();`. Flat if/else cascade over ~55 type names. #ifndef TLSEXTDLL block at 762-980 is included in the kernel/service build (only the companion TlsExt project defines TLSEXTDLL).

nodes_added.name: tlsSocP::OnDeclare
nodes_added.summary: Coco/R VM callback for `local tXxx name();`. Resolves visibility (local/mask/subsys/global) then delegates to ACreateObject.

nodes_added.name: tlsSocP::OnGetObjectPtr
nodes_added.summary: Resolves bare token references (`system`, `sql`, `file`, …) to tlsObject* via tlsEnv::FindObject.

nodes_added.name: tlsSystem::OnDoFunc
nodes_added.summary: Script-callable surface for tSystem. Dispatches CreateProcess, CreateProcessEx, ShellExecute, TerminateProcess, etc.

nodes_added.name: tlsSystem::CreateProcessEx
nodes_added.summary: 11-arg implementation. Resolves path via tlsFile::GetPathIfExists, calls Win32 CreateProcess directly with no allowlist.

nodes_added.name: tlsSystem::MyShellExecute
nodes_added.summary: Wraps Win32 ShellExecute. No verb allowlist, no extension filter.

nodes_added.name: tlsSoc::OnDoFunc
nodes_added.summary: Script-callable surface for tSoc. Dispatches CallScript, Exec, Calculate, etc.

nodes_added.name: tlsSoc::OnDoFunc Exec
nodes_added.summary: EVAL primitive. Reads a string value from a script-named variable, constructs a fresh tlsSoc with that string as source, Exec()s.

nodes_added.name: tlsSoc::OnDoFunc CallScript
nodes_added.summary: Dispatches another .scr by envVar+name+ext with script-supplied parameters.

nodes_added.name: tlsThread::OnDoFunc
nodes_added.summary: Script-callable surface for tThread. Dispatches InitScript, Start, Pause, Remove (with optional TerminateThread), IsRunning, etc.

nodes_added.name: tlsThread::OnDoFunc InitScript
nodes_added.summary: Records script body (envVar+filename+ext) + call cadence + callback for later Start to invoke.

nodes_added.name: tlsThread::Start (CreateThread call)
nodes_added.summary: Win32 CreateThread at line 570 spawns the worker that runs the script.

nodes_added.name: tlsFile::OnDoFunc
nodes_added.summary: Massive script-callable surface for tFile. Open/Read/Write/Delete/Copy/Move/CheckFile/ReadStrBase64/etc. No path allowlist at dispatch layer.

nodes_added.name: tlsJava::InitVM
nodes_added.summary: Loads jvm.dll from TMS_JAVAJRE / TMS_WORK / Vericut install, calls JNI_CreateJavaVM. JVM is in-process; can also reuse an existing JVM via JNI_GetCreatedJavaVMs.

edges_added.note: OnDeclare → tlsEnv::ACreateObject → tlsBase::ACreateObject (same code, single hop via inheritance).
`local tSystem name();` constructs tlsSystem; later calls dispatch via OnDoFunc.
`local tSoc name();` then later method calls dispatch via OnDoFunc.
tThread factory at line 902 of tlsBase.cpp.
tFile factory at line 731 of tlsBase.cpp.
tDir factory at line 741 of tlsBase.cpp.
tJava factory at line 745 of tlsBase.cpp. InitVM is called on first use to bring up the JVM.
case_CreateProcess / case_CreateProcessEx both forward to CreateProcessEx.
Raw Win32 CreateProcess at line 381 — pszCmdLine is script-controlled string, no shell escape.
Raw Win32 ShellExecute at lines 714 and 728.
Dynamic dispatch of any .scr on TMS_SCR.
Constructs a tlsSoc with sProgram as source and Exec()s.
InitScript records the body; Start() actually calls CreateThread.
Win32 CreateThread at line 570 launches the script-running worker.
GetProcAddress(jvm.dll, JNI_CreateJavaVM) at line 488, cast and call at line 504.

notes: tCode and tAssembly entries in ACreateObject (lines 951, 776) are recorded as registry presence but their OnDoFunc surfaces were not deep-read. Worth a future trace if .NET-side eval is in scope.
